Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

102 
HOSP_AT_HOME_FROM_DT 
LABEL: 
Hospital at Home Care from Date 
DESCRIPTION: This variable represents the beginning date of the beneficiary’s acute hospital at home care stay. 
SHORT NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_FROM_DT 
LONG NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_FROM_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field was new in 2021. 
This field is derived when the occurrence span code
